name: SHIZUOKA GAS CO. LTD.
summary: SHIZUOKA GAS CO. LTD. is a Japanese utility company engaged in the production, distribution, and sale of natural gas. The company also provides related services, such as gas appliance sales and maintenance, primarily in the Shizuoka Prefecture of Japan. TICKER: Shizuoka Gas Co. Ltd. is a Japanese utility company engaged in the production, distribution, and sale of natural gas, providing related services primarily in the Shizuoka Prefecture.
